Title.SourceString:
Choose the anti-aliasing quality to use.

Anti-aliasing smoothes jagged edges in the display.
Title.LocalizedString:
Choose the anti-aliasing quality to use.

Anti-aliasing smoothes jagged edges in the display.

Paragraph.SourceString:
Choose the anti-aliasing to use.

Anti-aliasing smoothes jagged edges in the display.
Paragraph.LocalizedString:
Choose the anti-aliasing to use.

Anti-aliasing smoothes jagged edges in the display.

Paragraph.SourceString: This will automatically apply the best video settings for your computer configuration.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: This will automatically apply the best video settings for your computer configuration.

Paragraph.SourceString: This will automatically apply the best video settings for your computer configuration.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: This will automatically apply the best video settings for your computer configuration.

Paragraph.SourceString:
Adjust the Brightness/Gamma

This will open up a separate calibration screen.
Paragraph.LocalizedString:
Adjust the Brightness/Gamma

This will open up a separate calibration screen.

Paragraph.SourceString: Controls the quality of foliage and grass.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Controls the quality of foliage and grass.

Paragraph.SourceString: Limit the Frames Per Second to this upper threshold.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Limit the Frames Per Second to this upper threshold.

Paragraph.SourceString: Choose the quality of ambient lighting.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Choose the quality of ambient lighting.

Paragraph.SourceString: Please enable GPU Crash Debugging if you experience crashes. The feature has a small performance cost.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Please enable GPU Crash Debugging if you experience crashes. The feature has a small performance cost.

Paragraph.SourceString: Turn on Nanite to improve geometry detail.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Turn on Nanite to improve geometry detail.

Paragraph.SourceString:
Choose the screen resolution for the game.

Press Apply for it to take effect.
Paragraph.LocalizedString:
Choose the screen resolution for the game.

Press Apply for it to take effect.

Paragraph.SourceString:
Choose the upscaling mode.

Upscaling is an algorithm used to improve visual fidelity.
Paragraph.LocalizedString:
Choose the upscaling mode.

Upscaling is an algorithm used to improve visual fidelity.

Paragraph.SourceString: Controls the equality of view distance.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Controls the equality of view distance.

Paragraph.SourceString: Turn on Vertical Synchronization (VSync) to eliminate screen tearing.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Turn on Vertical Synchronization (VSync) to eliminate screen tearing.
